caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting for a podcast recording. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a stand, with a white background featuring the words "HUSTLE" and yellow stars. To his left and right, on-screen graphics display "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101". On his shirt, the text "CHECK IT!" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and slightly adjusts his head position while speaking. In the second frame, he raises his left hand, gesturing with his fingers to emphasize a point. His gold chain and a watch on his wrist are visible. The background remains static throughout the frames, maintaining a consistent studio environment.
